characters.name: Digimon Racing/Characters
characters.description: What's needed:Rewrite in standardized format (we don't need to explain Biyomon is a bird, for example) in appendix style The initial playable characters inDigimon Racingare comprised of all the principle "rookie" level Digimon from the first season of theanimated series(orDigimon AdventureinJapan). These are characters that are not available initially, but can be unlocked by fulfilling certain requirements. The initial playable characters inDigimon Racingare comprised of all the principle "rookie" level Digimon from the first season of theanimated series(orDigimon AdventureinJapan).
characters.personality_section: The initial playable characters inDigimon Racingare comprised of all the principle "rookie" level Digimon from the first season of theanimated series(orDigimon AdventureinJapan).

characters.name: Digimon Rumble Arena/Characters
characters.description: What's needed:Rewrite in standardized, appendix-style format with pictures There are 24 playable characters inDigimon Rumble Arena, all drawn from theDigimon AdventureandDigimon Tamersanime. Nine characters are available at the start of the game, while the other fifteen require either a password or the completion of a certain task to access. The DigiDestined characters are depicted in their appearances inDigimon Adventure 02when they warp digivolving their partner Digimon to their Mega forms while Takato, Henry and Rika fromDigimon Tamersdo the same as Tai and the others with their partner Digimon by warp digivolution instead of being fused with their partner Digimon from Biomerge Digivolution to attain their Mega forms. Appmon Chip Reference Book(Standard•Super•Ultimate•God)
